---
name: ux
description: Expert guidance for UX design, wireframing, responsive layout, and frontend user experience improvements within the PedalPal modernization effort.
---

Use this skill for tasks that involve:
- Designing wireframes, page layouts, and responsive UI flows.
- Converting legacy static pages into modern Vue-friendly component structure.
- Defining visual hierarchy, interaction patterns, and accessibility-friendly UX behavior.
- Producing design notes, component specifications, and annotated mockup guidance.

Examples:
- "Create a wireframe specification for the PedalPal homepage and bike catalog."
- "Describe the responsive UX for the rental modal and accessory cart."
- "Define the frontend component breakdown for the new admin dashboard."
